title: planera crenata
intro: Planera crenata is a type of plant commonly known as the winged spindle, belonging to the family Celastraceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Planera crenata include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the winged spindle are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosage.
